response.overview: In this visceral and powerful film, renowned journalist Sean Langan achieves an unprecedented 'on the ground' insight to the Russian side of the war with Ukraine. With extraordinary access to the Eastern frontlines, Langan builds a compelling exploration of what it is to be a Russian soldier, and a Russian civilian under daily threat of bombardment.
response.tagline: An unseen and indispensable perspective on Russia's war against Ukraine
response.title: The Other Side
